name: Oportun Financial Corporation
description: Oportun Financial Corporation is a mission-driven digital banking platform that provides inclusive and affordable financial services to individuals. Founded in 2005 and headquartered in San Mateo, California, the company offers a suite of products including personal loans, secured personal loans, credit cards, and savings tools. By leveraging intelligent borrowing and budgeting capabilities, Oportun aims to empower its members to achieve their financial goals and build a more secure financial future. The company serves over 1.5 million customers, focusing on providing accessible financial solutions to those often underserved by traditional banking institutions.
